mission.title: vllm: [Model][VLM] Add Qwen2.5-Omni model support (thinker only)
mission.description:
This PR adding support for Qwen2.5-Omni model (thinker only).

## Requirements

This PR requires [this corresponding transformers PR](https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/36752).
```
pip install git+https://github.com/huggingface/transformers@f742a644ca32e65758c3adb36225aef1731bd2a8
```

**Note: You need to install transformers from source from that branch**

## Example Usage

```bash
# Audio + image + video
python examples/offline_inference/qwen2_5_omni/only_thinker.py -q mixed_moda

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
pip install git+https://github.com/huggingface/transformers@f742a644ca32e65758c3adb36225aef1731bd2a8
```

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
Looks like this PR doesn't work with https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/36752 yet
```

codeSnippets:
# Audio + image + video
python examples/offline_inference/qwen2_5_omni/only_thinker.py -q mixed_modalities

# Read vision and audio inputs from a single video file
# NOTE: V1 engine does not support interleaved modalities yet.
VLLM_USE_V1=0 python examples/offline_inference/qwen2_5_omni/only_thinker.py -q use_audio_in_video

# Process audio inputs
python examples/offline_inference/audio_language.py --model-type qwen2_5_omni

# Process image inputs
python examples/offline_inference/vision_language.py --modality image --model-type qwen2_5_omni

# Process video inputs
python examples/offline_inference/vision_language.py --modality video --model-type qwen2_5_omni
